turns.text: Hi, I'm disputing a transaction from last week. The merchant is fake and I don't want to pay for the service.
Thank you for reaching out to us. We'll need to investigate this further. Can you please provide the transaction ID and the date of the transaction?
Transaction ID: #123, Date: June 3rd. I'll also attach a screenshot of the merchant's website.
We've taken a note of the details. We'll look into the matter and update you within 7 working days as per our policy regarding disputes.
Resolution: We've initiated an investigation and will update you within 7 working days regarding the disputed transaction.

resolution: We've initiated an investigation and will update you within 7 working days regarding the disputed transaction.

turns.text: I made an UPI payment yesterday, but it's still pending. Can you please help me resolve this?
Sorry to hear that your payment is still pending. Can you please check with the recipient's bank to see if they've received the payment?
Yes, they've confirmed receiving the payment, but it's still not processing on NovaPay.
If the recipient's bank has confirmed receiving the payment, we'll manually process the payment to expedite the refund. You should receive the UPI refund within 3 working days.
Resolution: We've processed the payment manually and you should receive the UPI refund within 3 working days.

resolution: We've processed the payment manually and you should receive the UPI refund within 3 working days.

After checking, we found that the cashback offer has been successfully credited to your account. You can view it in the 'Rewards' section of the app.
Resolution: The cashback offer has been successfully credited to your account and is viewable in the 'Rewards' section.

resolution: A 7-day investigation has been initiated for the disputed cashback transaction, and you will be updated on the status by email and SMS after 7 days.
